column.text:
• New York Yankees placed RF Aaron Judge on the 10-day injured list with a right rib stress fracture.
• Milwaukee Brewers placed LHP DL Hall on the 15-day injured list with a left pectoral strain.
• Milwaukee Brewers designated RHP Jake Woodford for assignment.
• Houston Astros activated 2B Jose Altuve from the 10-day injured list.
• Texas Rangers activated LF Wyatt Langford from the 10-day injured list.
• New York Yankees sent LF Jasson Domínguez on a rehab assignment to Scranton/Wilkes-Barre RailRiders.
• Arizona Diamondbacks sent 1B Carlos Santana on a rehab assignment to ACL D-backs.
• San Diego Padres released RF Nick Castellanos.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
